title: JRose Collections Kids Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Gamer, Bricks & Farm Value Bags with 5 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Gamer, Bricks & Farm themes, each filled with exciting toys, stickers, puzzles, and creative activities.
🧩 5 Fun Surprises in Every Bag – Children will love opening each bag to discover unique games, crafts, small toys, and stickers for hours of fun.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Unwrap hours of fun with this 3 Pack Kids Lucky Bag Set, featuring Gamer, Bricks & Farm themes. Each colourful bag contains 5 unique surprises, including toys, stickers, crafts, and puzzles for endless fun. Every bag also includes a free themed activity sheet, packed with educational challenges such as colouring, matching games, tracing, and word searches – perfect for sparking creativity and learning through play. These Lucky Bags are ideal as party bag fillers, rewards, travel games, or fun surprise treats. Kids will love the variety, parents will love the safe design. ✅ UKCA/CE certified 🚫 Not suitable for children under 3 years Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
